TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qphay ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 92 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 59 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 33 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 63%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qphay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qphay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qphay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qphay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qphay hya' ga Zihing (Ziehing). tay 'llaw na Qphay hya' ga Balung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qpħaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ). taj ʔllaw na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa βaluŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qphay ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 92 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 59 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 33 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 63%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qphay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qphay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qphay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qphay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qphay hya' ga Zihing (Ziehing). tay 'llaw na Qphay hya' ga Balung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qpħaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa ziħiŋ (zieħiŋ). taj ʔllaw na qpħaj ħjaʔ ɣa βaluŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
